Talk about a gulf in class! FK Kairat are rooted to the bottom of the UEFA Champions League table with just 1 point, a staggering 23 points behind leaders Arsenal after 8 matches.
Nigerian powerhouse Victor Osimhen has been clinical in the UEFA Champions League, scoring 7 goals in just 10 appearances for Galatasaray!
Five English clubs are absolutely dominating the UEFA Champions League, with Arsenal, Liverpool, Tottenham, Chelsea, and Man City all sitting within the top 8 after 8 matchdays!
Newcastle United are making waves in the UEFA Champions League, with both Anthony Gordon and Harvey Barnes featuring in the top 10 goal scorers!
Kylian Mbappé is absolutely running away with the UEFA Champions League Golden Boot race, hitting an incredible 15 goals for Real Madrid!
Surprisingly, Villarreal CF, a club known for their European exploits, are currently sitting at the very bottom of the UEFA Champions League table with just one point from 8 games!
Both Villarreal CF and FK Kairat are still searching for their first win in the UEFA Champions League, managing only a single point each after 8 matchdays!

Forget late drama, Man Utd INVENTED it in '99!
